projectDescription: An Android application that brings Lossless Scaling frame generation to Android devices via a Vulkan pipeline, MediaProjection capture, and system overlay — no root required.
keyFeatures: GPU-accelerated frame generation (LSFG_3_1 / LSFG_3_1P) via AHardwareBuffer Vulkan sharing
System overlay with touch passthrough using SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW or AccessibilityService
MediaProjection-based screen capture pipeline for non-rooted devices
Live in-game settings drawer: multiplier (2x–8x), flow scale, HDR mode, anti-artifacts, vsync, and more
Automatic per-app overlay that arms when a target game comes to the foreground
Post-processing pipelines: NPU/NNAPI presets, GPU upscaling, and CPU enhancement (LUT, vibrance, vignette)
Frame graph HUD with real vs. total FPS, frame-time graph, and pacing diagnostics
Shizuku integration for privileged timing side-channel and pacing diagnostics
Crash reporter capturing Java/Kotlin and native signals with stack-walking
First-launch tutorial for Accessibility setup and Restricted Settings unblock
publicApiSurface: NPU presets via NNAPI: sharpen, detail boost, chroma clean, game crisp
CPU enhancement: LUT, vibrance, saturation, vignette
Shizuku privileged target-UID timing side channel
